name: Issue
about: Bug, feature request, or chore

assignees: ''

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing what needs to change and why. -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- Current behaviour or gap. Why does this need to be done? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- What should be built or changed? Keep it concrete. -->

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] <!-- Specific, testable condition that marks this done -->

## Out of Scope
<!-- What is explicitly NOT part of this issue. -->

## Notes
<!-- Additional context, links, screenshots, or open questions. -->
